description: Verified against openclaw models list on 2026-03-07. OpenClaw 2026.3.2.

verified_available.claude-opus-4-6: claude_code_only, NOT via OpenClaw model routing

not_yet_available.openai-codex/gpt-5.4: PRs open in OpenClaw, not merged. Run: openclaw models list to check.

opus_backup.note: Oragorn has anthropic/claude-opus-4-6 configured and it is currently working via auth-profiles.json in his agent dir. DO NOT TOUCH THIS CONFIG. Do not modify oragorn agent model setting. Do not delete auth-profiles.json. This access may stop working if Anthropic enforces ToS. Preserve as backup for future use.

quandalf.note: Runs via Claude Code, not OpenClaw model routing.

oragorn.note: DEFAULT to GPT. Opus access exists as backup but do not switch to it unless deliberate. See opus_backup section.

logron.note: Cheap fast model for mostly deterministic work.

thinking_levels.note: Per-agent thinking config not yet supported in OpenClaw (feature request open). Global thinkingDefault in openclaw.json applies to all agents. Workaround: add thinking level instruction to each agent AGENTS.md.
thinking_levels.cron_thinking: Can be set per cron job via job.thinking
thinking_levels.session_command: /think <level> — sets for current session only, resets on /new

when_gpt54_lands: openclaw models list — verify gpt-5.4 appears
Update oragorn + frodex model in openclaw.json agents.list
Update this file: move from not_yet_available to verified
